sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64715" key="makrote/nwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μακρο-τένων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οντος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n64715.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">far-stretching, long</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἇλος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.96</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eryc.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
